---
marimo-static-output: true
---

# API Reference {.doc .doc-index}

## Package

Public constructors, helpers, enums, callbacks, and extension base classes exported by `json2vec`.

| | |
| --- | --- |
| [json2vec](json2vec.qmd#json2vec) | Public `json2vec` SDK surface. |

## Model

| | |
| --- | --- |
| [Model](Model.qmd#json2vec.Model) | Neural model generated from a `json2vec` schema tree. |

## Schema

| | |
| --- | --- |
| [Array](Array.qmd#json2vec.Array) | Repeated nested object group in a `json2vec` schema. |
| [Hyperparameters](Hyperparameters.qmd#json2vec.Hyperparameters) | Serializable schema and training metadata used to build a `Model`. |
| [where](where.qmd#json2vec.where) | Start a schema predicate against a node attribute. |

## Tensorfield Constructors

| | |
| --- | --- |
| [Number](Number.qmd#json2vec.Number) | Numeric scalar tensorfield request. |
| [Category](Category.qmd#json2vec.Category) | Categorical scalar tensorfield request backed by an online vocabulary. |
| [Set](Set.qmd#json2vec.Set) | Multi-label set tensorfield request backed by an online vocabulary. |
| [DateParts](DateParts.qmd#json2vec.DateParts) | Date/time tensorfield request that extracts configured calendar parts. |
| [Entity](Entity.qmd#json2vec.Entity) | Per-observation entity tensorfield request for local identity matching. |
| [Vector](Vector.qmd#json2vec.Vector) | Fixed-width numeric vector tensorfield request. |
| [Text](Text.qmd#json2vec.Text) | Text tensorfield request encoded by a frozen Hugging Face model. |

## Data

| | |
| --- | --- |
| [CustomDataModule](CustomDataModule.qmd#json2vec.CustomDataModule) | Lightning data module for user-provided iterable datasets. |
| [PolarsDataModule](PolarsDataModule.qmd#json2vec.PolarsDataModule) | Lightning data module for in-memory Polars DataFrames. |
| [StreamingDataModule](StreamingDataModule.qmd#json2vec.StreamingDataModule) | Lightning data module for streaming records from files. |

## Batch Inference

| | |
| --- | --- |
| [Writer](Writer.qmd#json2vec.Writer) |  |
| [Postprocessor](Postprocessor.qmd#json2vec.Postprocessor) |  |

## Preprocessing

| | |
| --- | --- |
| [preprocess](preprocess.qmd#json2vec.preprocess) | Register a callable as a `json2vec` preprocessor. |
| [Preprocessor](Preprocessor.qmd#json2vec.Preprocessor) | Registered observation preprocessor. |
